use_cases: Terminal-style decorative animation for landing pages
ASCII art loading animation for dev tool interfaces
Fun interactive visual accent for creative portfolios
ai_summary: An ASCII art 3D pyramid animation rendered with colored characters in a terminal aesthetic. The component displays a rotating geometric pyramid using character-based rendering with configurable face colors, wireframe mode, rotation speed and axis. Designed as a visual showpiece for dev tools, creative portfolios, or retro-themed interfaces.
